title: taraxacum adhaerens
intro: Taraxacum adhaerens, also known as sticky dandelion, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion genus, characterized by its stickiness due to the presence of latex on its leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum adhaerens include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum adhaerens, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent, allowing for the extraction of its active compounds.
